findings.title: External action lacks approval
findings.description: The agent can take an outward-facing or business-impacting action without a human approval gate.

findings.title: Approval gap for external action
findings.description: Medium or high impact agent actions should have explicit review or approval before execution.
evidence: Action 'email' can run without human approval.

findings.title: External action lacks approval
findings.description: The agent can take an outward-facing or business-impacting action without a human approval gate.

findings.title: Approval gap for external action
findings.description: Medium or high impact agent actions should have explicit review or approval before execution.
evidence: Action 'api_call' can run without human approval.

findings.title: External action lacks approval
findings.description: The agent can take an outward-facing or business-impacting action without a human approval gate.

findings.title: Approval gap for external action
findings.description: Medium or high impact agent actions should have explicit review or approval before execution.
evidence: Action 'transaction' can run without human approval.

findings.title: Sensitive data controls are incomplete
findings.description: Sensitive data processing lacks one or more basic privacy controls.

findings.title: Sensitive data encryption is not required
findings.description: Sensitive or confidential data should have explicit encryption requirements.

findings.title: Sensitive data controls are incomplete
findings.description: Sensitive data processing lacks one or more basic privacy controls.

findings.title: Regulated or financial data exposure
findings.description: Financial or regulated data increases the need for controlled records, monitoring, and review.
evidence: Privacy controls missing: retention policy, PII redaction.

findings.title: Sensitive data encryption is not required
findings.description: Sensitive or confidential data should have explicit encryption requirements.

findings.title: Sensitive data controls are incomplete
findings.description: Sensitive data processing lacks one or more basic privacy controls.

findings.title: Regulated or financial data exposure
findings.description: Financial or regulated data increases the need for controlled records, monitoring, and review.
evidence: Privacy controls missing: retention policy, PII redaction.

findings.title: Sensitive data encryption is not required
findings.description: Sensitive or confidential data should have explicit encryption requirements.

findings.title: Tool permission is not approval-gated
findings.description: The workflow gives the agent broad or potentially dangerous tool permissions without approval.

findings.title: Tool can trigger external impact
findings.description: A tool permission can create outward-facing or business-impacting effects without approval.
evidence: Tool 'customer_email_sender' can send external messages or trigger financial action.

findings.title: Tool permission is not approval-gated
findings.description: The workflow gives the agent broad or potentially dangerous tool permissions without approval.

findings.title: Privileged tool execution risk
findings.description: Execute or transaction-capable tools increase security and access-control risk.

findings.title: Tool permission is not approval-gated
findings.description: The workflow gives the agent broad or potentially dangerous tool permissions without approval.
evidence: Tool 'transaction_executor' has permissions: write, execute, trigger_financial_action.

findings.title: Tool can trigger external impact
findings.description: A tool permission can create outward-facing or business-impacting effects without approval.
evidence: Tool 'transaction_executor' can send external messages or trigger financial action.

findings.title: Privileged tool execution risk
findings.description: Execute or transaction-capable tools increase security and access-control risk.

findings.title: Audit trail is incomplete
findings.description: The workflow may be difficult to investigate, replay, or evidence during governance review.
evidence: Missing audit feature: log retention period.

findings.title: Model evaluation coverage is incomplete
findings.description: The workflow has missing model quality, hallucination, monitoring, or fallback checks.

findings.title: Operational monitoring or fallback is incomplete
findings.description: Missing fallback and monitoring controls can delay detection or recovery when the agent fails.

findings.title: Untrusted content lacks prompt-injection testing
findings.description: Agents that read emails, web content, uploaded documents, or customer messages need direct and indirect prompt-injection tests.
evidence: Workflow appears to process untrusted external content.

findings.title: Prompt injection can affect tool use
findings.description: Prompt injection can cause data leakage, unsafe tool use, or unauthorized external actions.

findings.title: Deployment resilience controls are incomplete
findings.description: Production-like agent deployments need operational limits, rollback, and incident-response readiness.
evidence: Missing deployment control: incident response plan.

findings.title: Secrets management is missing for privileged tools
findings.description: Privileged tools and external APIs should use managed secrets rather than ad hoc credentials.
evidence: Workflow includes API, execution, external-send, or transaction-capable tools.

findings.title: Sensitive memory controls are incomplete
findings.description: Long-lived memory that contains sensitive data should support expiration and deletion.
evidence: Missing memory control: memory expiration policy.
Missing memory control: user deletion support.

findings.title: External API dependency is present
findings.description: External providers and APIs introduce availability, data handling, and vendor-control considerations.
evidence: Workflow includes an API tool or API-call external action.

recommendations: Review the 'external_action:email' action path and require approval when business impact is medium or high.
Review the 'external_action:api_call' action path and require approval when business impact is medium or high.
Review the 'external_action:transaction' action path and require approval when business impact is medium or high.
Classify sensitive input fields, redact personal data where possible, and document retention for each data category.
Split read, write, execute, and external-send permissions into separately approved tool scopes.
Review the 'tool:customer_email_sender' action path and require approval when business impact is medium or high.
Review the 'tool:transaction_executor' action path and require approval when business impact is medium or high.
Make assessment replay possible by retaining tool-call logs, decision traces, and exportable audit records.
Add a human approval gate before high-impact external actions such as outbound messages, API calls, file changes, or transactions.
Apply rate limits to constrain the frequency and volume of automated agent actions.
Redact or mask personal and financial identifiers before model processing or long-term storage.
Define and enforce a retention policy for inputs, outputs, logs, and memory records.
Restrict the agent to an allowlist of approved tools and permissions that match the workflow's business purpose.
Add direct and indirect prompt-injection tests for untrusted emails, web pages, uploaded documents, and customer messages.
Document an incident response process for data leakage, harmful tool use, and incorrect external actions.
Store API keys and credentials in a secrets manager or environment-managed secret store.
Enable tool-call audit logging with timestamp, tool name, input summary, output summary, and execution status.
Require source attribution for factual claims in generated reports or customer-facing content.
Run a task-specific evaluation suite covering hallucination, regression, and answer-quality checks before release.
Define fallback behavior for low-confidence outputs, tool failures, and missing evidence.
